title: Firework Duration Colour
description: Shows different colours for fireworks of different flight durations, as well as a warning colour for those explosive ones.
body:
A simple resource pack that indicates flight duration of firework rockets using colours. Orange for 1, blue for 2, purple for 3, just like what you'd expect from a spectrum (well maybe reversed).

If the firework rocket contains explosion, it shows a texture of black and yellow, as a warning. No more exploding from elytra-thrusting with dangerous fireworks!
